outputs.description: Function that calculates percent change from an OperationsPipe

PercentChange.description: Compute the percent change (other - baseline) / baseline

outputs.description: Function that calculates absolute change from an OperationsPipe
Function that calculates Mantel-Haenszel estimate from an OperationsPipe

MH.description: Compute the Mantel-Haenszel estimator for ratio metrics stratified by specified columns

outputs.description: Function that calculates CUPED adjustment from an OperationsPipe

CUPED.description: Compute the absolute change adjusted using the CUPED approach

outputs.description: Function that calculates PrePost adjustment from an OperationsPipe

PrePostChange.description: Compute the percent change adjusted using the PrePost approach

outputs.description: Function that filters conditions from an OperationsPipe

FilterConditions.description: Filter the data to include only specified conditions

outputs.description: Function that performs power analysis from an OperationsPipe

PowerAnalysis.description: Perform power analysis to determine sample size requirements

outputs.description: Function that creates a stratified summary from an OperationsPipe

StratifiedSummary.description: Create a summary of metrics stratified by specified columns

outputs.description: Function that calculates bootstrap CIs from an OperationsPipe

BootstrapCI.description: Calculate bootstrap confidence intervals for the difference in means

outputs.description: Function that adjusts p-values from an OperationsPipe

MultiComparisonAdjustment.description: Apply multiple comparison adjustment to p-values

ExecuteOperations.description: Execute the operations pipeline and return all calculated operations
